title: Synthesize two sources
subtitle: Combine two views into one answer.
overview: B2 synthesis compares sources, not just lists them.
Mention agreement, difference, and your conclusion.

items.es: Ambas fuentes coinciden en que la tecnología ha cambiado la educación.
items.en: Both sources agree that technology has changed education.

items.es: La primera se centra en las ventajas de la flexibilidad.
items.en: The first focuses on the advantages of flexibility.

items.es: La segunda destaca los riesgos de la distracción.
items.en: The second highlights the risks of distraction.

items.es: Juntas muestran que el problema no es la tecnología en sí.
items.en: Together they show that the problem is not technology itself.

items.es: La cuestión central es cómo se usa.
items.en: The central question is how it is used.
